# TryonAI - AI Wingo Prediction Platform

TryonAI is an advanced AI-powered prediction and signals platform for the Wingo30 lottery game. It features real-time trend analytics, candlestick pattern recognition, and smart trading signals.

## Core Pages

### [Home Page (Root)](https://wingo30.com/)
* **Description:** Public landing page detailing TryonAI's features, signal charts, and a user authentication gateway. Logged-in users access the interactive dashboard with live 30-second game predictions.
* **Keywords:** Wingo AI, Wingo30 prediction, live signals.

### [Subscription Plans](https://wingo30.com/subscription)
* **Description:** Pricing and enrollment portal for TryonAI VIP signals.
* **Pricing:** ₹799 (PRO PLANS) for unlimited predictions, real-time analytics, and expert signal dashboards.
* **Checkout:** Managed securely via UPI, Paytm, Google Pay, and PhonePe with UTR verification.

### [Developer API Portal](https://wingo30.com/developer)
* **Description:** Developer hub to integrate real-time Wingo30 game data into third-party apps.
* **Endpoints:**
  - `GET /api/developer/30-sec-game-history`: Historical draw numbers, colors, sizes, and pattern results.
  - `GET /api/developer/30-sec-game-stats`: Frequency metrics and hot/cold number analytics.
* **Authentication:** SECURE API Key authentication via `x-api-key` header.

### [Support & Contacts](https://wingo30.com/contact)
* **Description:** Customer support portal. Provides official Telegram channel (`https://t.me/kal_mods`) and email support links.

## Legal and Compliance
* [Privacy Policy](https://wingo30.com/privacy) - Information regarding user data collection and storage.
* [Terms & Conditions](https://wingo30.com/terms) - User agreement guidelines for Wingo game analytics.
* [Refund Policy](https://wingo30.com/refund) - Terms for VIP subscription payment cancellations.
